purpose: small anonymized demonstration dataset for inspecting data structure and public script interfaces; not used to reproduce manuscript numerical results
period_length: 59 days on a 5-min grid, absolute dates replaced by relative time indices and day-clock labels
anonymization: sensor IDs replaced; timestamps converted to relative indices and relative day-clock labels; liquid levels centered by sensor median and scaled by sensor IQR; original asset names, coordinates, absolute dates and absolute levels omitted
public_use_boundary: figure-level and table-level numerical reproduction of the manuscript should use derived source-data tables; end-to-end regeneration from raw records requires authorised data-owner access

sensors.source_filename_hash_note: source filename withheld; deterministic demo ordering only
sensors.transform: sensor median removed and divided by sensor IQR; original timestamps replaced by relative indices and relative day-clock labels
